mapping_description:
This ETL mapping extracts data from ST_EM_ITEM_MASTER  table from Stage table to Work & Exception table

sdande : Logic has been changed in sync with the KINAXIS logic to populate REORDER_POINT_QTY,
STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY,
CT2R_DAYS_CNT,

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
      TVOUTPUT.ITEM_KEY AS ITEM_KEY,
      TVOUTPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY AS INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
      CAST(TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT,
      COALESCE (MAX (CAST (TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT AS DATE) - INTERVAL '1' DAY) 
                   OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.ITEM_KEY,TVOUTPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
ORDER	BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC ROWS BETWEEN 1 
                           FOLLOWING
	AND	1 FOLLOWING), DATE '3500-01-01') AS END_TV_DT,
     TVOUTPUT.REORDER_POINT_QTY AS REORDER_POINT_QTY,
     TVOUTPUT.ADDITIONAL_REORDER_POINT_QTY AS ADDITIONAL_REORDER_POINT_QTY,
     TVOUTPUT.MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY AS MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY,
     TVOUTPUT.MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QTY AS MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QTY,
     TVOUTPUT.STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY AS STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY, 
     TVOUTPUT.CT2R_DAYS_CNT AS CT2R_DAYS_CNT,
     TVOUTPUT.ACTION_CODE AS ACTION_CODE,
     CAST(TVOUTPUT.CREATE_DATETIME  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
     CAST(TVOUTPUT.CREATE_DATETIME  AS TIMESTAMP(0)) AS UPDATE_DATETIME,
     ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY TVOUTPUT.ITEM_KEY,
                                       TVOUTPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY                                 
ORDER	BY TVOUTPUT.START_TV_DT ASC) AS RANK_INDEX,
     (
		CASE
			WHEN	RANK_INDEX = 1
	AND	TT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY IS NOT NULL
	AND	TT.ITEM_KEY IS NOT NULL 
	AND TT.START_TV_DT IS NOT NULL
      THEN 'U'
			ELSE	'I' END) AS DML_TYPE 
FROM
 (
SELECT	
         ITEM_KEY,
         INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
         CAST(START_TV_DT AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT,
         REORDER_POINT_QTY,
         ADDITIONAL_REORDER_POINT_QTY,
         MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY,
         MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QTY,
         STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY,
         CT2R_DAYS_CNT,
         ACTION_CODE,
         CAST(CREATE_DATETIME AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
         EXCEPTION_TYPE,
         ROW_NUMBER () OVER (PARTITION BY ITEM_KEY, INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
                                          REORDER_POINT_QTY, ADDITIONAL_REORDER_POINT_QTY,
                                          MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY, MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QTY,
                                          STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY,  CT2R_DAYS_CNT
ORDER	BY CREATE_DATETIME DESC ) AS ROW_NUM
FROM	
 (
SELECT	
         NII.ITEM_KEY,
         NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
         CAST(EIMO.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT,
         EIMO.REORDER_POINT_QUANTITY AS REORDER_POINT_QTY,
         EIMO.SINGLE_USE_KANBAN_QUANTITY AS ADDITIONAL_REORDER_POINT_QTY,
         EIMO.MINIMUM_ORDER_QUANTITY AS MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY,
         EIMO.MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QUANTITY AS MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QTY,
         EIMO.ROP_SAFETY_STOCK_QUANTITY AS STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY,
         CT2R.CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH AS CT2R_DAYS_CNT,
         EIMO.ACTION_CODE,
         CAST(EIMO.CREATE_DATETIME AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
         'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
                                $$STGDB.ST_EM_ITEM_MASTER EIMO ,
                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO ,
                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII , 
                                 $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES FLV,
                                (SELECT  
                                                MAX(EIM.CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH) AS CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH,
                                                EIM.PRODUCT_ID ,
                                                MP.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                                FROM 
                                                $$STGDB.ST_EM_ITEM_MASTER EIM ,
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG MP ,
                                                $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES FLV
                                                where 1=1
                                                AND FLV.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                                                AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXSCM_PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER'
                                                AND FLV.LANG = 'US' 
                                                AND MP.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = FLV.LOOKUP_CODE 
                                                AND COALESCE( FLV.ENABLED_FLAG , 'Y' ) = 'Y' 
                                                AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 = EIM.PARTNER_ID
                                                GROUP BY 2,3
                                ) CT2R
WHERE
                                1=1
                                AND FLV.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                                AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXSCM_PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER'
                                AND FLV.LANG = 'US' 
                                 AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = FLV.LOOKUP_CODE 
                                 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 IS NOT NULL
                                AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 <>'153804570'
                                AND COALESCE( FLV.ENABLED_FLAG , 'Y' ) = 'Y' 
                                 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 = EIMO.PARTNER_ID
                                AND NII.BK_PRODUCT_ID = EIMO.PRODUCT_ID 
                                 AND NII.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                AND CT2R.PRODUCT_ID = NII.BK_PRODUCT_ID
                                AND CT2R.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NII.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY



UNION	ALL

SELECT	
       NII2.ITEM_KEY,
       NCIO2.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
       CAST(EX.CREATION_DATE AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT,
       EX.REORDER_POINT_QUANTITY AS REORDER_POINT_QTY,
       EX.SINGLE_USE_KANBAN_QUANTITY AS ADDITIONAL_REORDER_POINT_QTY,
       EX.MINIMUM_ORDER_QUANTITY AS MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY,
       EX.MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QUANTITY AS MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QTY,
       EX.ROP_SAFETY_STOCK_QUANTITY AS STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY,
       EX.CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH AS CT2R_DAYS_CNT,
       EX.ACTION_CODE,
       CAST(EX.CREATE_DATETIME AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
       EX.EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
     $$EXCEPDB.EX_EM_ITEM_MASTER EX,
                                  $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO2 ,
                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII2 , 
                                 $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES FLV2,
                                (SELECT  
                                                MAX(EIM.CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH) AS CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH,
                                                EIM.PRODUCT_ID ,
                                                MP.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                                FROM 
                                                $$STGDB.ST_EM_ITEM_MASTER EIM ,
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG MP ,
                                                $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES FLV
                                                where 1=1
                                                AND FLV.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                                                AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXSCM_PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER'
                                                AND FLV.LANG = 'US' 
                                                AND MP.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = FLV.LOOKUP_CODE 
                                                AND COALESCE( FLV.ENABLED_FLAG , 'Y' ) = 'Y' 
                                                AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 = EIM.PARTNER_ID
                                                GROUP BY 2,3
                                ) CT2R2
WHERE
                                1=1
                                AND FLV2.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                                AND FLV2.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXSCM_PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER'
                                AND FLV2.LANG = 'US' 
                                 AND NCIO2.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = FLV2.LOOKUP_CODE 
                                 AND FLV2.ATTRIBUTE15 IS NOT NULL
                                AND FLV2.ATTRIBUTE15 <>'153804570'
                                AND COALESCE( FLV2.ENABLED_FLAG , 'Y' ) = 'Y' 
                                 AND FLV2.ATTRIBUTE15 = EX.PARTNER_ID
                                AND NII2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = EX.PRODUCT_ID 
                                 AND NII2.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NCIO2.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                AND CT2R2.PRODUCT_ID = NII2.BK_PRODUCT_ID
                                AND CT2R2.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NII2.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY

UNION	ALL

SELECT	
       TTV.ITEM_KEY,
       TTV.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
       CAST(TTV.START_TV_DT AS DATE) AS START_TV_DT,
       TTV.REORDER_POINT_QTY AS REORDER_POINT_QTY,
       TTV.ADDITIONAL_REORDER_POINT_QTY AS ADDITIONAL_REORDER_POINT_QTY,
       TTV.MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY AS MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY,
       TTV.MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QTY AS MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QTY,
       TTV.STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY AS STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY, 
       TTV.CT2R_DAYS_CNT AS CT2R_DAYS_CNT,
       'X' ACTION_CODE,
       CAST(TTV.EDW_UPDATE_DTM AS TIMESTAMP(0) ) AS CREATE_DATETIME,
       'NE' EXCEPTION_TYPE
FROM
    $$INVFLMTVWdb.N_CM_ITEM_REORDER_POINT_TV TTV
WHERE
    TTV.END_TV_DT = CAST ('3500-01-01' AS DATE) 
	AND
    (ITEM_KEY, INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY) IN
       (
SELECT	DISTINCT NP1.ITEM_KEY,NCIO1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
FROM
                                $$STGDB.ST_EM_ITEM_MASTER EIMO ,
                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO1 ,
                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NP1 , 
                                 $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES FLV,
                                (SELECT  
                                                MAX(EIM.CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH) AS CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH,
                                                EIM.PRODUCT_ID ,
                                                MP.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                                FROM 
                                                $$STGDB.ST_EM_ITEM_MASTER EIM ,
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG MP ,
                                                $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES FLV
                                                where 1=1
                                                AND FLV.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                                                AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXSCM_PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER'
                                                AND FLV.LANG = 'US' 
                                                AND MP.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = FLV.LOOKUP_CODE 
                                                AND COALESCE( FLV.ENABLED_FLAG , 'Y' ) = 'Y' 
                                                AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 = EIM.PARTNER_ID
                                                GROUP BY 2,3
                                ) CT2R
WHERE
                                1=1
                                AND FLV.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                                AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXSCM_PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER'
                                AND FLV.LANG = 'US' 
                                 AND NCIO1.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = FLV.LOOKUP_CODE 
                                 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 IS NOT NULL
                                AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 <>'153804570'
                                AND COALESCE( FLV.ENABLED_FLAG , 'Y' ) = 'Y' 
                                 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 = EIMO.PARTNER_ID
                                AND NP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID = EIMO.PRODUCT_ID 
                                 AND NP1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NCIO1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                AND CT2R.PRODUCT_ID = NP1.BK_PRODUCT_ID
                                AND CT2R.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NP1.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
	AND	NCIO1.INV_ORG_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = '3500-01-01'



UNION	  

SELECT	DISTINCT NP2.ITEM_KEY,NCIO2.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
FROM
 
   $$EXCEPDB.EX_EM_ITEM_MASTER EX2,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO2 ,
                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NP2 , 
                                $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES FLV,
                                (SELECT  
                                                MAX(EIM.CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH) AS CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH,
                                                EIM.PRODUCT_ID ,
                                                MP.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                                FROM 
                                                $$STGDB.ST_EM_ITEM_MASTER EIM ,
                                                $$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG MP ,
                                                $$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES FLV
                                                where 1=1
                                                AND FLV.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                                                AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXSCM_PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER'
                                                AND FLV.LANG = 'US' 
                                                AND MP.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = FLV.LOOKUP_CODE 
                                                AND COALESCE( FLV.ENABLED_FLAG , 'Y' ) = 'Y' 
                                                AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 = EIM.PARTNER_ID
                                                GROUP BY 2,3
                                ) CT2R
WHERE
                                1=1
                                AND FLV.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
                                AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXSCM_PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER'
                                AND FLV.LANG = 'US' 
                                 AND NCIO2.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = FLV.LOOKUP_CODE 
                                 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 IS NOT NULL
                                AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 <>'153804570'
                                AND COALESCE( FLV.ENABLED_FLAG , 'Y' ) = 'Y' 
                                 AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 = EX2.PARTNER_ID
                                AND NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID = EX2.PRODUCT_ID 
                                 AND NP2.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NCIO2.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
                                AND CT2R.PRODUCT_ID = NP2.BK_PRODUCT_ID
                                AND CT2R.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NP2.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
	AND	NCIO2.INV_ORG_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE = '3500-01-01'
	AND	EX2.EXCEPTION_TYPE = 'RI' )
 ) TVINPUT
QUALIFY	ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY TVINPUT.ITEM_KEY,TVINPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY,
TVINPUT.REORDER_POINT_QTY, TVINPUT.ADDITIONAL_REORDER_POINT_QTY,
                                          TVINPUT.MINIMUM_ORDER_QTY, TVINPUT.MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QTY,
                                          TVINPUT.STATISTICAL_INV_SIZING_QTY,  TVINPUT.CT2R_DAYS_CNT
                                        ,TVINPUT.START_TV_DT
ORDER	BY TVINPUT.CREATE_DATETIME DESC ) = 1
)  TVOUTPUT
LEFT OUTER JOIN $$INVFLMTVWdb.N_CM_ITEM_REORDER_POINT_TV AS TT
	ON	  TVOUTPUT.ITEM_KEY = TT.ITEM_KEY
	AND	TVOUTPUT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = TT.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
	AND	TT.END_TV_DT = CAST('3500-01-01' AS DATE)
	WHERE	TVOUTPUT.ROW_NUM =1

SELECT
      SEIM.ITEM_MASTER_ID, 
      SEIM.BATCH_ID,
      SEIM.PRODUCT_ID,
      SEIM.PARTNER_ID,
      SEIM.REORDER_POINT_QUANTITY,
      SEIM.SINGLE_USE_KANBAN_QUANTITY,
      SEIM.MINIMUM_ORDER_QUANTITY,
      SEIM.MINIMUM_PACKAGE_QUANTITY,
      SEIM.ROP_SAFETY_STOCK_QUANTITY,
      SEIM.CYCLE_TIME_TO_REPLENISH,
      'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,
      SEIM.ACTION_CODE,
      SEIM.CREATION_DATE,
      SEIM.CREATE_DATETIME,
      SEIM.LAST_UPDATE
FROM
    $$STGDB.ST_EM_ITEM_MASTER SEIM
WHERE NOT EXISTS
         (
SELECT 1 
FROM
$$COMREFVWDB.N_INVENTORY_ITEM NII,
$$ETLVWDB.EL_FND_LOOKUP_VALUES FLV,
$$COMREFVWDB.N_CISCO_INVENTORY_ORG NCIO
WHERE 
 NII.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY = NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGN_NAME_KEY
AND NCIO.INVENTORY_ORGANIZATION_CODE = FLV.LOOKUP_CODE
AND NCIO.INV_ORG_EFFECTIVE_END_DATE ='3500-01-01'
AND FLV.GLOBAL_NAME = 'CG'
AND FLV.LOOKUP_TYPE = 'XXSCM_PARTNER_DUNS_NUMBER'
AND FLV.LANG = 'US' 
AND FLV.ATTRIBUTE15 <>'153804570'
AND COALESCE( FLV.ENABLED_FLAG , 'Y' ) = 'Y' 
AND NII.BK_PRODUCT_ID = SEIM.PRODUCT_ID
AND SEIM.PARTNER_ID = FLV.ATTRIBUTE15)
